note: Trigger-eval set for pr-create — the OPEN-a-PR step. Boundaries: commit (local persist, no PR), task-deliver (commit+PR pipeline step), pr-review/code-review (review an existing PR), task-fix-pr (apply review feedback), changelog (release notes), plain gh/git ops (merge/close/list). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: open a pull request for this branch
create a PR
push and open a PR against dev
the feat/pagination branch is ready — submit it for review as a pull request
my manager wants this shipped as a PR with a proper description and verification checklist
make a pull request and link the PROJ-412 issue in the body
open a PR for this board task, prefix the title with the tracker id
raise a pull request into main for the bugfix I just committed
PR this please, base branch is develop
everything's pushed already, just cut the pull request with a good summary and changes section
review the pull request on #128 for bugs and security issues
merge my PR into dev once CI is green
queries.note: merge op → gh pr merge / pr-merge, not opening a PR

queries.text: address the review comments on my open PR and reply to each thread
commit these changes but don't open a PR yet
list all open pull requests assigned to me
queries.note: plain gh pr list, no authoring

queries.text: edit the description on my existing PR to mention the config change
queries.note: editing an existing PR → gh pr edit, not create

queries.text: generate release notes for the PRs merged since v0.6.0
close the stale PR #94 without merging
why did the checks fail on my pull request?
write a PR template markdown file under .github/
queries.note: authoring a template file, not opening a PR

queries.text: I already committed, now open a pull request for the branch
queries.note: shares 'committed' vocab but the action is to open a PR — must beat commit

queries.text: the review is done, put up the PR with the verification checklist filled in
queries.note: mentions review but the ask is to open the PR — must beat pr-review

queries.text: deliver this task — verification passed, commit and open the PR
queries.note: full pipeline delivery (commit+PR, gated on verify) → task-deliver is more specific

queries.text: code review this pull request before I request approval
queries.note: reviewing an existing PR → pr-review, not opening one
